subcodes.first_line: O kind God! I render thanks unto Thee that Thou hast enabled and confirmed me to serve at Thy Threshold and protect Thy loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهربان يزدان من شکر ترا که مرا بر خدمت آستانت و صيانت دوستانت موفّق و مؤيّد فرمودی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @chastisement and requital, @humility; meekness; lowliness
